description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a brownish cover reinforced by four metallic corner protectors, giving it a sturdy and somewhat antique appearance. The cover features a blue diamond-shaped emblem with some white markings or symbols at its center. Several colored ribbon bookmarks—teal, purple, and maroon—protrude from the pages, suggesting frequent use or reference. The book is held closed by a wide, metallic clasp that spans the front cover. The pages are visibly thick and slightly yellowed, indicating age or high-quality paper. The overall design suggests a book of importance, possibly a journal, spellbook, or reference tome.
description: A thick, hardbound book with metallic corner protectors, a blue emblem on the cover, and multiple colored ribbon bookmarks. It features a wide metallic clasp and appears well-used and sturdy.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the metallic corner protectors, blue emblem, and two ribbon bookmarks—one teal and one maroon—protruding from the pages.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the metallic clasp securing the book, the blue emblem on the cover, and three visible ribbon bookmarks (teal, maroon, and purple).
description_view_2: This side view shows the metallic corner protectors, the blue emblem, and a prominent purple ribbon bookmark sticking out from the bottom.
description_view_3: The back view displays the plain brown cover with metallic corners and two ribbon bookmarks (teal and purple) visible at the edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a blue diamond-shaped emblem with white markings or symbols at its center, surrounded by plain brown material and metallic corner protectors. No other illustration or artwork is visible.
